name: Mediterranean Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cooked and chopped (about 2 cups)
1/2 medium red pepper, chopped, or to taste
1/4 cup sliced black olives, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken breasts until done, then chop into bite-sized pieces.
2. Chop the red pepper and add to a bowl with the chopped chicken.
3. Add light mayonnaise, sour cream, green onions, sun-dried tomatoes, Italian seasoning, and black olives to the bowl.
4. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
6. Serve with crackers or on croissants.
Note: This recipe is a variation of one taken from the back of a Wheat Thins box.
